prompt.content:
Draft an email to Levi with:
Today’s date
What lesson from the unit the class completed today
The Do Now activity, along with any instructions.
The Guided Instruction activity, along with any instructions.
The Summative Assessment activity, along with any instructions.
How to prepare for tomorrow’s lesson
A heads up that I've notified his parents of his unexcused absence and that I expect him to complete all of the following work within 2 school days or he will receive a zero on the missing assignments
We’re a day behind the unit overview schedule.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Dear Levi,

I am writing in regards to your absence from English class today, October 21st, 2025. In addition to sending this email, I have also notified your parents of your unexcused absence. I’m including in this email the material that you missed during today’s class. It is my expectation that you will complete all of the following assignments, and have them turned in within two school days. Failure to do so will unfortunately result in a zero on any missed assignments. Please take advantage of this opportunity to get your missing assignments turned in on time!

Lesson 6 - October 21st, 2025
To Kill a Mockingbird

Do Now:
Write down two predictions for what you think will happen in chapters 7 and 8.

Guided Instruction:
Read Chapters 7-8. You may choose to read silently or listen to the provided audio version of the chapters. 

Summative Assessment: 
Exit Ticket. Write a summary of what you have read in chapters 7 and 8. Your summary should be a paragraph and contain a minimum of five sentences.

Additionally, you will need to come prepared to tomorrow’s class by reading Chapters 10-14. Please let me know if you have any questions about the assignments. 

Sincerely,  Mrs. A
